name: ころコロ
short_description: This game is a gyro-only game. Please make sure that your controller is equipped with a gyro function before purchasing. Roll around with the gyro control. Overcome numerous gimmicks and aim for the goal! A total of 50 stages. Tilt and roll 5 balls of different shapes to reach the goal.
detailed_description:
Attention.

This game is a gyro-only game. Please make sure that your controller is equipped with a gyro function before purchasing.
The Xbox controller cannot be used for this game because it does not have a gyro function.

Please play the trial version first to check the operation of the controller.

Operation-confirmed controllers

DualSense, DUALSHOCK 4, Nintendo Switch Pro Controller

Features

Roll around with the gyro control! Overcome numerous gimmicks to reach the goal!

Korokoro is a gyro-only casual game. A total of 50 stages. Tilt and roll 5 balls of different shapes to reach the goal.

We recommend playing the "Normal Mode" first, which is quite challenging after 30 stages. "Reverse mode" reverses the controller controls. "Survival Mode" is a 10-stage continuous play mode for advanced players.

Normal Mode

Contains 50 stages

Reverse mode

50 stages as in Normal Mode

Gyro control reversed mode

Survival Mode

10-stage continuous play mode

Stage design is the same as Normal Mode

Tips of the game

Take your time and don't rush. Don't get frustrated if you make a mistake. Accuracy over speed.

Video Submission and Live Streaming

Both individuals and corporations can distribute their own videos.

Monetization through distribution services (spacha, etc.) is also not a problem.
